title: 10pc Sterile Surgical Grade Replacement Scalpel Blades Universal Fit - Size 11
description:
For precision cutting, nothing beats a scalpel. Made from a single piece of metal, these sturdy scalpel blades will ensure you get a good cut when you can't afford to slip. An excellent tool for an X-acto knife job. Cuts great though mats,fabric, cardboard, and gloss paper. Never run out of blades! Take your craft to the next level with these great scalpel blades!
